steps.title: Apply the zero product property
steps.content:
The equation is already factored as a product equal to zero. By the zero product property, at least one factor must equal zero:
$$5x+4=0 \quad \text{or} \quad 2x-5=0$$

steps.title: Match solutions to the choices
steps.content: The solution $-\frac{4}{5}$ appears in the choices. That matches choice C — C is correct.
